THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KAPADIA, BIPIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHRINIKA INVESTMENTS, LLC $7,156.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,296.00, SHRINIKA INVESTMENTS, LLC OWES PLAINTIFF $7,156.00 IN UNPAID INSURANCE PREMIUMS PLUS COURT COSTS. PLAINTIFF DID NOT MEET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF TO PIERCE THE LLC AND HOLD THE INDIVIDUAL MEMBERS LIABLE FOR THE LLC'S OBLIGATION TO PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF SHALL TAKE NOTHING AS AGAINST THE INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-29-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-29-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ERIC GROVER. PLAINTIFF BIPPIN KAPADIA IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS NEHA BHAGAT. DEFENDANT SHRINIKA INVESTMENTS, LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY BHAVESH PATEL (). DEFENDANT BHAVESH PATEL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HANSABEN PATEL IS NOT PRESENT REPRESENTED BY HITESH PATEL (SON). DEFENDANT HITESH PATEL IS PRESENT. CASE HEARD TOGETHER WITH CSM-23-866694 KAPADIA VS ARMAAN INVESTMENTS, LLC ET AL. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS RETAINED; ONE SET OF EXHIBITS FOR BOTH CASES. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
